field_values.action_summary: Having proven his strength, the narrator requests food and water. Sola leads him to a decorated sleeping chamber where he is allowed to rest and encounters a strange, ten-legged Martian creature.
field_values.camera_intent: Soft warmer lighting for martian_sleeping_quarters; Close-ups of the ten-legged creature; Medium shots of sola guiding The Narrator
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Movement and limb count of the ten-legged creature
Lighting transition from grand hall to private quarters
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH004_SC004

## Production Intent
Transition the narrative from high-stakes physical exertion to domestic Martian life by establishing a sense of safety and curiosity within a private living space. The visual language must shift from grand, cold marble architecture to warm, intimate interior lighting.

## Required Cast
- The Narrator
- sola (Red Martian humanoid, human scale)

## Required Environments
- Interior Hallways
- martian_sleeping_quarters (Decorated)

## Continuity Constraints
- Appearance and movement of the ten-legged creature (limb count/motion)
- Lighting transition from grand hall to private quarters

## Beat List
- BT001: Request for sustenance and guidance
- BT002: Arrival and respite
- BT003: Discovery of the creature
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
